$comment: What the stats monitor watches. It NEVER edits site data — it only alerts (via a GitHub issue) when a public source drifts from these baselines, so a human can verify in-app and update. When you confirm and update a real figure on the site, bump its baseline here too.

metrics.label: Spotify monthly listeners
metrics.note: Shown on the site as ~52.36M (app/data/africasBiggest.ts). Re-verify in the Spotify app before updating.

metrics.label: Spotify peak monthly listeners (all-time high)
